Package algorithm

Class Route

java.lang.Object
algorithm.Route
public final class Route extends Object
An immutable, ordered sequence of SensorNode objects representing one planned UAV path through the sensor network.

Distance model

Total distance is the sum of consecutive Euclidean segment lengths along the open path — from the first node to the last. The return leg (closing the circuit back to the start) is intentionally excluded: the UAV collects data in a single pass and is not required to return to its origin.

Fitness

Fitness is defined as the reciprocal of total distance, per the thesis specification: fitness = 1 / totalDistance. A shorter route has a higher fitness value. For a single-node route (distance = 0), fitness is Double.MAX_VALUE.

Immutability guarantee

Total distance is computed exactly once at construction time. Because the route cannot change, no caching flag is needed — the fitness value is always derived directly from the stored distance. The node list returned by getNodes() is unmodifiable; callers that need a mutable copy must construct one explicitly.

This class replaces the legacy Path.java, correcting:

  • The broken isFitnessChanged flag (which was always reset by the getNodes() getter, making the cache guard dead code).
  • The raw-typed ArrayList — nodes are now typed as List<SensorNode>.

  • Constructor Details

    • Route

      public Route(List<SensorNode> nodes)
      Constructs a Route from the given ordered node list.

      A defensive copy of nodes is made internally; modifications to the caller's list after construction have no effect on this route.

      Parameters:
      nodes - ordered sequence of nodes to visit; must not be null or empty
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if nodes is null or empty

  • Method Details

    • getNodes

      public List<SensorNode> getNodes()
      Returns the ordered node sequence for this route.

      The returned list is unmodifiable. Callers requiring mutation must wrap it: new ArrayList<>(route.getNodes()).

      Returns:
      unmodifiable ordered list of nodes

    • getTotalDistance

      public double getTotalDistance()
      Returns the pre-computed total path distance.

      Calculated once at construction; subsequent calls incur no computation.

      Returns:
      total Euclidean path length (≥ 0)

    • getFitness

      public double getFitness()
      Returns the fitness of this route.

      Defined as the reciprocal of total distance per the thesis specification: 

        fitness = 1 / totalDistance
      A shorter route yields a higher fitness value. For a degenerate single-node route (distance = 0), returns Double.MAX_VALUE to avoid division by zero while ensuring such a route is never selected as optimal over any real multi-node path.
      Returns:
      fitness value; higher is better

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the number of nodes in this route.
      Returns:
      node count (≥ 1)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
